summary:
A competent professional with 18 Years of experience in Industry, infrastructure
encompass- ing a wide range of skill set.
coordination skills for all smooth functioning of overall operations.
civil con- struction projects include steel plant, textile mill, Pharma plant,
Automobile, water supply projects, Infrastructure projects.

Expertise in coordinating with contractors, Clients and Project Managers for
achieving the goals on given timelines.

Experience in Annual maintenance work, Statistical analysis of concrete and Quality
control.

Extensive hands on the Project Management skills -

Handling project activities involving working out various requirements with
respect to utili- ties, aesthetics & monitoring overall project operations for
ensuring timely completion.

Liaising with the consultant’s/project managers for resolving design-related issues
and trou- bles on site. Designing building as per requirements keeping in mind the
by-laws, feasibility with respect to various building services, cost factor with
emphasis on aesthetics part.

Checking specifications, bill of items in consultation with the contractors.

Administering the construction of projects as per plans/drawings, budgets &
time con- strains.

Skillful at testing of material, checking of work, study of drawings, monitoring and
analyzing of physical problem

To conduct Periodical meeting with contractor and their staff to maintain the safe
working environment at site.

Strong team orientation, leadership qualities, hardworking, Customer Oriented
attitude and Effective communicator with good interpersonal skills being a smooth
team player.

Skillful in addressing new business requirements and supporting day-to-day
activities re- lated
